v3_footer_html:
UGIP Nainital Est. 1956 · AICTE Approved

One of Uttarakhand's premier Polytechnic Colleges, committed to producing industry-ready engineers and pharmacists through quality technical education, holistic development, and strong industry partnerships.

AICTE Approved All India Council for Technical Education
